title: WA7 4HG, Viridor Energy Runcorn CCUS Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/QP3724SE/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Viridor Energy Runcorn CCUS Limited   Installation name: Runcorn CC Facility, Barlow Way, Runcorn, WA7 4HG   Permit number: EPR/QP3724SE   "
